---
title: "Poverty Rate Map"
subtitle: "Provincial and district poverty rates from SUSENAS 2023"
date: 2025-06-15
categories: [Development Economics, SUSENAS, Interactive, lang:English]
description: "An interactive choropleth map of poverty headcount rates at province and district level, disaggregated by urban and rural areas using SUSENAS 2023."
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

Placeholder — replace with your Shiny or Observable embed.
